workflow_defaults.business_consequence: If finance review lands after the payment cut-off, the vendor payment moves to the next business day.
workflow_defaults.trace_fixture_basis: Runtime-generated free local export from an Ollama-backed invoice approval agent.

attributes.agent.name: AP Agent
attributes.aag.authority_subject: AP Agent may classify invoices and prepare approval packets.
attributes.aag.headline: INV-OLLAMA-LOCAL-7001 - Northstar Analytics - $12,750
attributes.aag.metadata.risk_note: Delayed payment risk - review after cutoff.
attributes.service.name: ollama-agent-runtime

attributes.agent.name: AP Agent
attributes.tool.name: lookup_purchase_order
attributes.aag.action_summary: AP Agent verified the PO record before preparing the approval recommendation.
attributes.aag.authority_subject: AP Agent may retrieve supporting PO records through approved read-only finance tools.
attributes.aag.headline: Agent pulled PO evidence from the finance system
attributes.aag.why_it_mattered: The approval packet included source-system evidence before the policy gate ran.
attributes.service.name: local-erp-tool

attributes.agent.name: AP Agent
attributes.aag.action_summary: AP Agent prepared the approval packet with invoice, PO, and payment cut-off context.
attributes.aag.authority_subject: AP Agent may prepare approval packets but cannot approve invoices above USD 5,000.
attributes.aag.headline: Agent assembled the approval packet for finance review
attributes.aag.why_it_mattered: The agent accelerated review preparation without crossing the final approval boundary.
attributes.service.name: ollama-agent-runtime

attributes.aag.action_summary: Policy engine evaluated the approval recommendation against delegated authority.
attributes.aag.policy_explanation: Invoice amount 12,750.00 exceeds the agent approval threshold of 5,000.00.
attributes.aag.recommended_next_action: Escalate to a finance approver before any approval is executed.
attributes.aag.headline: Policy gate escalated the invoice into a finance review case
attributes.service.name: policy-engine

attributes.aag.action_summary: Finance Director approved the invoice after reviewing the PO evidence, control lane, and payment cut-off risk.
attributes.aag.authority_subject: Finance Director holds final approval authority for invoices above the delegated agent threshold.
attributes.aag.human_decision_reason: Approved because the PO matched, the spend was authorized, and missing the cut-off would have delayed vendor payment.
attributes.aag.decision_rationale: Approved because source-system evidence was complete and the payment cut-off risk outweighed waiting for another review cycle.
attributes.aag.headline: Finance Director resolved the review case and approved the invoice
attributes.service.name: finance-review-console
